tagline: Malden's Lock & Door Specialists — Fast, Reliable, Done Right
hero_subtitle: Full-service locksmith and door hardware experts serving Malden and the North Shore. Residential, commercial, and emergency services you can count on.
service_area_description: Serving Malden, Medford, Everett, Melrose, Revere, Saugus, and surrounding North Shore communities.
seo_title: East Coast Lock & Door | Locksmith & Door Services in Malden, MA
seo_description: East Coast Lock & Door — residential, commercial, and emergency locksmith and door services in Malden, MA. Fast response, fair pricing, trusted locally.
services_subtitle: From emergency lockouts to commercial door installation — expert lock and door services when you need them most.
reviews_subtitle: Our customers count on us for fast response, quality workmanship, and fair prices — every time.
cta_heading: Need a locksmith or door repair — now?
cta_subtitle: Call us for fast service across Malden and the North Shore. Emergency and same-day appointments available.
footer_description: Full-service locksmith and door specialists serving Malden, MA and the North Shore. Residential, commercial, and emergency services. Locally owned and operated.

services_featured.name: Emergency Lockout Service
services_featured.description: Locked out of your home, office, or vehicle? Our technicians respond fast with the tools and expertise to get you back inside — without damage.

services_secondary.name: Residential Lock & Door Service
services_secondary.description: Deadbolt installation, lock rekeying, door repairs, weather stripping, and home security upgrades to keep your family safe.

services_accent.name: Commercial Lock & Door Systems
services_accent.description: Master key systems, access control, commercial door installation and repair, panic hardware, and door closers for offices and storefronts.

services_wide.name: Door Installation & Repair
services_wide.description: Interior and exterior door installation, frame repair, hinge replacement, and storm door fitting for residential and commercial properties.

about_features.title: Lock & Door Experts
about_features.description: We specialize in both locksmith services and door hardware — a rare combination that means one call handles everything.

about_features.title: Fast Local Response
about_features.description: Based in Malden and serving the entire North Shore, we arrive quickly for emergencies and scheduled appointments alike.

about_features.title: Licensed & Insured
about_features.description: Fully licensed and insured technicians who treat your property with care and stand behind every job.

reviews.name: Homeowner
reviews.text: Called East Coast after a break-in damaged our front door. They replaced the door and locks the same day. Professional, fast, and fairly priced.

reviews.name: Office Manager
reviews.text: They installed a master key system for our entire office building. Clean work, great communication, and everything works perfectly.

reviews.name: Landlord
reviews.text: I use East Coast Lock & Door for all my rental properties. Quick rekeying between tenants and they always give me a fair price. Highly recommend.
